elements.text: Tree Injection in XXI century by Syngenta

Syngenta is entering the tree injection market: 
Pine Wilt Nematode (PWN) in Japan and Korea
Injection of Emamectine protects pine trees for over 5 years from infestation by PWN
Emerald ash borer in the USA

Problems in Europe:
Pine wilt nematode
Horse chestnut leaf miner
Processionary moth on oak and pine
Red palm weevil
Asian longhorn beetle

Many obstacles in Europe:
Environment concern
Non target animals, as bees
Aplicator safety
Phytotox / damage to trees
